topic: My hallway wallpaper has been peeling in a pattern that spells a word and the word is half complete
title: My Hallway Wallpaper Has Been Peeling in a Pattern That Spells a Word | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My hallway wallpaper peels in the shape of letters. Spells a word. Half complete.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old floral wallpaper peeling on a hallway wall in the shape of capital letters, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Ranch house. Built sixty four. Inherited from my aunt last fall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a single story ranch house in autumn afternoon light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Old wallpaper. Flowers. Cream and pink.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of vintage cream and pink floral wallpaper on a hallway wall, the seams visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Noticed the peeling in November. Took it for normal aging.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of wallpaper peeling at a seam with a small flap of paper curled outward, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Got the wallpaper paste. Tried to glue it back.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a tube of wallpaper adhesive on a wooden floor beside a curled flap of paper, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It peeled the same way overnight. Same shapes. Letters.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a section of wallpaper peeled in the shape of two capital letters, dim hallway lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photographed the wall. Read it left to right.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a smartphone screen displaying a photograph of a hallway wall with peeled wallpaper forming letters, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Four letters had appeared. C O M E. The peeling was forming a sentence.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a hallway wall showing four letters peeled into the wallpaper spelling out COME, dim afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three more letters by December. F O R. Spaces between them.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of the same hallway wall with additional peeled letters spelling COME FOR, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yesterday the next word started. M E. Then a comma. Then a name.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a hallway wall with peeled wallpaper forming a partial phrase COME FOR ME and the start of a proper name, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I will not say the name out loud.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a hallway at dusk with a section of the wall obscured by shadow, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is on my driver's license. And four other documents.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a driver's license on a wooden table with the name partially obscured by a thumb, vertical 9:16 framing
